note: Owner pre-decided all 9 governing questions (TODO.md §6.0); decisions firm. Mechanism details tagged [assumed]. Grounded in a full live-code read 2026-05-31 (baseline 361 tests pass). Line numbers indicative — executor confirms against live files.

phases.title: Alerting reliability (durable failure records + bounded retry)
Single AlertPolicy + GeoWeighter (decision consolidation; remove corroboration)

requirements.statement: Add Romania to monitoring.target_countries as {code: RO, name: Romania, name_native: Rumunia}.
Add geography.high_tier_countries containing PL,LT,LV,EE,RO (RO HIGH-eligible).
No hardcoded city/town/gazetteer; country resolution stays LLM-driven country-level.
Add Romanian-language source(s)/keywords.
Prompt target-country gate: unnamed 'a NATO country' must not resolve to Poland/a specific monitored country unless named.

Revise the 'EXCLUSIVELY PL/LT/LV/EE' (L142) + 'non-monitored=1-3' (L143-144) clauses: monitored=PL/LT/LV/EE/RO are 9-10 eligible; non-monitored NATO not auto-9; NATO-attack-on-Russia HIGH; scope line (L14-15) includes Romania.
Demote R4 POLAND PRIORITY (L57-59) to a confirmed-PL tie-break; must not promote non-PL to PL.
Preserve (not weaken) explicit-country-only + physical-location rules (L34-37, L145-146); spillover affects urgency only.
Preserve inside-Ukraine = urgency 1-3 (R9); not labeled as attack on a monitored country.
Set config.testing.eval_set_file to eval_set_human.yaml (owner gate).
Add testing.regression_eval_set_file (=eval_set.yaml) wired as a non-gating regression run.
Must not modify/pre-fill/bootstrap labels in either eval fixture; owner is sole labeler.
Add 'RO' to harness.MONITORED_COUNTRIES so RO/9 maps to phone_call in eval.
Persist a failed send as an alert_records row status='failed' with non-null error_code (not only a log line).
Bound cross-cycle phone-retry rounds by config alerts.retry.max_rounds against a durable per-event counter events.alert_round_count; terminal status (failed_terminal) at cap; not in-memory.
Failed primary send must not silently drop the alert; recorded + retried up to cap.
Twilio/push clients MUST return a structured failure result (replacing bare None) carrying error code/detail; all 'if record is None' call sites updated so the failure record (1.1) captures it.
_confirmation_code/_confirmation_sms_sid scoped per-event.
All retry/cap values from config; none hardcoded.
alert_records schema change migrates existing rows without data loss (additive columns).

AlertPolicy is the single decision authority; the THREE old decision sites (corroborator._determine_alert_status, state_machine._determine_action, harness._action_for_urgency) are deleted or delegate.

Corroboration removed; no source-count gate may suppress/delay. Remove the full surface: both YAML keys, both Pydantic fields (ClassificationConfig.corroboration_required default 2, UrgencyLevel.corroboration_required), and the tests/conftest.py key — config still loads cleanly.
Dedup is the only suppressor: no-alert only when relation==SAME on an already-alerted event.
Urgency >=call-tier (9-10) -> CALL; lower -> NOTIFY.

GeoWeighter computes geo_tier (HIGH if target in high_tier_countries OR target==RU & attacker_is_nato; LOW for inside-UA/interior-MD) and floors kinetic HIGH-tier to >=9; CALL requires urgency>=tier AND geo HIGH.
UNKNOWN geo at urgency>=9 treated as HIGH (fail toward firing).
kinetic derived deterministically from event_type against config-driven geography.kinetic_event_types (not a new LLM field, not hardcoded); single definition consumed by 2.5 and 3.8.
NEW at CALL tier fires a call; ESCALATION/UPDATE to an already-alerted event uses NOTIFY, not a second call.
Decision is channel-agnostic; AlertIntent carries a channel class; transports pluggable and preserved.
All thresholds + geography membership in config; none hardcoded.
AlertPolicy.decide is a pure no-I/O function.
Defines EventDecision contract (relation NEW|SAME|ESCALATION + matched_event_id) as the Phase 3 interface.
EventDeduplicator.decide replaces corroborator._find_matching_event grouping and emits EventDecision (article-level deduplicator.py untouched).
Ambiguous same/new defaults to NEW, never SAME.
Split driven by concrete signals (geo_id, tier-cross, time gap), not wording.
geo_id normalization collapses cross-language place refs (Galati variants) via transliteration, no town list.
Higher-or-equal-urgency new event at same place must not be a silent SAME (no attach-and-silence); sub-critical->critical surfaces as ESCALATION/NEW.
Strike on monitored soil while another event open -> NEW + CALL re-eval (RO-open->PL-strike).
Dedup must not suppress across a different geo_id or across the CALL-tier boundary.
Kinetic strike must not merge into a non-kinetic airspace-violation event (same geography.kinetic_event_types definition as 2.5b).
Deduplicator MAY use the already-emitted is_new_event as a NEW-direction (split) signal only; MUST NOT use it as a merge-toward-prior signal.
Deterministic core does no network/LLM I/O; fully unit-testable.
Create blank-label dedup_traps.yaml (schema + authored catastrophe seeds, labels empty); must not fill labels.
All dedup windows/thresholds/normalization in config; none hardcoded.
Embedding model runs locally; no hosted embedding API in the dedup path.
Embeddings fail-open: failed embed -> NEW (fire), never suppression.
Embedding similarity only in the ambiguous band; Phase 3 deterministic hard overrides not overruled.
Sonnet 4.6 judge invoked only when urgency>=9 on either side.
Geo-floored->=9 HIGH-tier article fires CALL first; judge runs async, only suppresses the next copy, never gates the first call.
Judge fails-open on timeout/429/error -> NEW + CALL under config judge_timeout_seconds.
Classification stays Haiku 4.5; only the dedup judge escalates to Sonnet 4.6.
Embedding/judge model ids, trigger, band thresholds, judge_timeout_seconds, Tier-2 toggle in config; none hardcoded.
Embedding model is a lightweight quantized multilingual model suited to the VPS; exact choice tuned against the over-merge eval.
Embedding/judge tests hermetic (mock model + API); real-model/API tests marked non-gating (integration).

tests.name: test_prompt_scope_includes_romania
tests.assertion: system scope names Romania; 9-10 clause includes RO; 'EXCLUSIVELY ... PL, LT, LV, or EE' string revised/gone

tests.name: test_prompt_nato_attack_on_russia_high
tests.assertion: prompt makes a NATO/member attack ON Russia HIGH-eligible

tests.name: test_prompt_target_country_gate
tests.assertion: prompt forbids resolving unnamed 'a NATO country' to Poland/a specific monitored country

tests.name: test_prompt_r4_scoped_to_confirmed_pl
tests.assertion: R4 scoped to 'Poland already confirmed'; no non-PL->PL promotion

tests.name: test_prompt_affected_countries_explicit_only
tests.assertion: explicit-country-only + physical-location rules still present

tests.name: test_prompt_inside_ukraine_low
tests.assertion: inside-Ukraine = urgency 1-3 rule still present

tests.name: test_config_ro_target_country
tests.assertion: object with code=='RO' in monitoring.target_countries

tests.name: test_config_ro_high_tier
tests.assertion: 'RO' in geography.high_tier_countries

tests.name: test_config_no_gazetteer
tests.assertion: no key named gazetteer/places/cities/coordinates/geocells at any depth; target_countries entries have only {code,name,name_native}

tests.name: test_config_eval_gate_human
tests.assertion: config.testing.eval_set_file ends with eval_set_human.yaml

tests.name: test_config_regression_eval
tests.assertion: config.testing.regression_eval_set_file ends with eval_set.yaml and differs

tests.name: test_harness_monitored_includes_ro
tests.assertion: 'RO' in harness.MONITORED_COUNTRIES

tests.name: test_harness_does_not_write_fixtures
tests.assertion: harness source has no write/open-for-write against tests/fixtures/

tests.name: test_failed_call_is_recorded
tests.assertion: make_alert_call returns None -> alert_records row status='failed' with non-null error_code

tests.name: test_retry_rounds_bounded
tests.assertion: max_rounds=3 + persistent failure -> terminal failed status after 3 rounds; stops re-entering

tests.name: test_failure_record_has_error_code
tests.assertion: Twilio failure error code captured into persisted failure record

tests.name: test_confirmation_code_per_event
tests.assertion: ACK for event A does not resolve event B

tests.name: test_retry_cap_is_config_driven
tests.assertion: round count follows config max_rounds (1 then 5)

tests.name: test_migration_adds_columns_preserves_rows
tests.assertion: old-schema rows intact after migration; error_code/error_detail present with defaults

tests.name: test_new_critical_high_calls
tests.assertion: NEW + urgency9 + HIGH -> channel-class CALL

tests.name: test_escalation_high_notifies_not_recall
tests.assertion: ESCALATION on already-alerted + urgency9 + HIGH -> NOTIFY, not CALL

tests.name: test_same_already_alerted_suppresses
tests.assertion: SAME on already-alerted -> no alert

tests.name: test_no_corroboration_gate
tests.assertion: NEW + urgency9 + HIGH + single source -> still CALL; no corroboration_required key in config

tests.name: test_low_geo_critical_does_not_call
tests.assertion: NEW + urgency9 + LOW (inside-UA) -> not CALL

tests.name: test_unknown_geo_critical_fails_open
tests.assertion: NEW + urgency9 + UNKNOWN geo -> treated HIGH -> CALL

tests.name: test_lower_urgency_notifies
tests.assertion: NEW + urgency5 + HIGH -> NOTIFY, not CALL

tests.name: test_geo_weighter_nato_attacks_russia_high
tests.assertion: target=RU, attacker_is_nato=true -> geo_tier HIGH

tests.name: test_geo_weighter_floors_high_tier_kinetic
tests.assertion: HIGH-tier kinetic event with LLM urgency 4 -> floored >=9

tests.name: test_geo_weighter_kinetic_from_event_type
tests.assertion: event_type in geography.kinetic_event_types -> kinetic True; troop_movement -> False; follows config

tests.name: test_thresholds_config_driven
tests.assertion: moving the call-tier threshold shifts the CALL boundary

tests.name: test_old_decision_sites_removed
tests.assertion: corroborator._determine_alert_status and harness._action_for_urgency gone/thin; state_machine._determine_action delegates to AlertPolicy; harness.MONITORED_COUNTRIES still exists

tests.name: test_event_decision_contract
tests.assertion: EventDecision exposes relation + matched_event_id consumed by AlertPolicy

tests.name: test_geo_id_cross_language_collapse
tests.assertion: Galati variants normalize to one geo_id

tests.name: test_different_geo_id_splits
tests.assertion: two articles different geo_id -> two NEW

tests.name: test_urgency_tier_cross_splits
tests.assertion: same place, second crosses CALL tier -> ESCALATION/NEW, never silent SAME

tests.name: test_ambiguous_defaults_to_new
tests.assertion: no concrete same-event signal -> NEW

tests.name: test_no_attach_and_silence
tests.assertion: higher-urgency strike same place as low event -> not silent SAME

tests.name: test_ro_open_then_pl_strike_splits
tests.assertion: RO event open then PL-soil strike -> NEW for CALL re-eval

tests.name: test_kinetic_not_merged_into_nonkinetic
tests.assertion: kinetic strike vs open airspace-violation event -> not merged

tests.name: test_dedup_no_network_io
tests.assertion: network/LLM patched to raise -> decide still returns EventDecision

tests.name: test_dedup_traps_schema
tests.assertion: fixture parses, defined fields + authored seeds, every label field blank

tests.name: test_dedup_traps_behavioral
tests.assertion: parametrized over LABELED cases only (unlabeled skip); verdict matches owner label

tests.name: test_dedup_window_config_driven
tests.assertion: changing dedup window shifts time-gap split boundary

tests.name: test_embedding_fail_open
tests.assertion: embedder patched to raise -> decide returns NEW

tests.name: test_embedding_only_in_ambiguous_band
tests.assertion: hard geo_id mismatch -> split despite forced high similarity

tests.name: test_judge_only_on_high_urgency
tests.assertion: urgency5 -> judge not called; urgency9 either side -> judge called (mocked)

tests.name: test_judge_is_fire_first
tests.assertion: geo-floored->=9 HIGH-tier article fires CALL without awaiting a blocking judge mock

tests.name: test_judge_fail_open
tests.assertion: judge raises/times out -> NEW + CALL

tests.name: test_classification_model_is_haiku
tests.assertion: classifier id resolves to claude-haiku-4-5-20251001; judge id to a Sonnet 4.6 id

tests.name: test_dedup_smart_layer_config_driven
tests.assertion: Tier-2 toggle off -> judge never invoked

1: .venv/bin/ruff check sentinel/alerts/state_machine.py sentinel/alerts/twilio_client.py sentinel/alerts/push_client.py sentinel/database.py sentinel/models.py
2: .venv/bin/ruff check sentinel/alerts/policy.py sentinel/classification/geo_weighter.py sentinel/classification/corroborator.py sentinel/alerts/state_machine.py sentinel/eval/harness.py
.venv/bin/python -c "from sentinel.alerts.policy import AlertPolicy, EventDecision; from sentinel.classification.geo_weighter import GeoWeighter"
